curation_notes: Re-curated with updated hint guidelines. Locations derived from PR #3075 patch diff. The fix adds removeLeadingFileSeparator() in ZipUtils.java and applies it in both TarUtils.untar() and ZipUtils.unzip(). Only 2 non-test source files changed. L3 hints differentiated from L1/L2 by specifying tar/zip archive formats and the model artifact unpacking context. Vulnerability class path-traversal confirmed from CWE-22 and patch behavior.
